The '''Agorffi''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. They were known for their strength and brawn, and were often bracketed with other strong species such as [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] and [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]; their resilience, however, made them a prime target for the [[Slaver Syndicate]]. The Slaver Syndicate was a large [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] syndicate operating during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They captured [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] of low value, then bought the ownership rights to their captives and sold them as [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] individuals.<ref name="GG9" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Agorffi were created for ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'', a [[West End Games]] sourcebook written by [[Simon Smith]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann|Eric Trautmann]] and published in [[1993]].<ref name="GG9" />
